stream_note: stream lane runs the official portkeyai/gateway:1.15.2 image (lockfile-resolved deps); the npx artifact's 'tryTargetsRecursively error: immutable' failure (Portkey-AI/gateway#1389, caused by the caret-pinned @hono/node-server floating past 1.14.2 at npx-install time) does not reproduce on the image - verified locally against an SSE mock, re-verified in the field run
hardware: AWS m7g.4xlarge (Graviton3, 16 cores / 64 GB). Gateway-under-test pinned to 4 cores (the comparable basis); mock and load generator on 6 cores each so the mock never bottlenecks the streaming sweep. Ubuntu 24.04. One dedicated box per gateway.
